case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. RONDA KERR et al

docket_entries.description: SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
DECLARATION RE: 1. REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT 2. COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS 3. INTEREST 4. WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KERR, RONDA DOES 1-25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-22-2011
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $260.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT KERR, RONDA

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-25
